description: Composition Blue kurta made of a 100% cotton fabric, has tie-up shoulder straps, round neckline with a half buttoned placket, pintucks on the waist that flare out at the hips and floral print Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva  is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
